title: CITY OF HERMISTON PARKS AND RECREATION - 211info
text: CITY OF HERMISTON CITY OF HERMISTON PARKS AND RECREATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides athletic (youth and adult sports) and community-based recreation opportunities in community centers and swimming pools. Operates and maintains city parks, natural areas, hiking trails, and community centers. 180 NE 2nd Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Activities and classes are available for all ages, with special programs for young children, youth, and adults. Hours: Varies by program Email (541) 667-5018 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 667-5018 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information or for a calendar of events FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Hermiston Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Public Parks Recreation Centers Swimming Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF HERMISTON LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER CAMP UTILITIES - UTILITY PAYMENT DISCOUNTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
